feat.name: Deathguard
feat.text: The twisting rotted limbs, clattering bones, or swirling ectoplasm of your horde can hide you from others' vision. You and your allies can occupy the same space as your horde, becoming concealed to all creatures when you do so.

traits.name: Archetype
traits.text: This feat belongs to an archetype.
